title: struthanthus subrotundus
intro: Struthanthus subrotundus, also known as the 'Monkey's Comb' or 'Monkey Comb', is a plant species belonging to the Loranthaceae family, and it is a type of hemiparasitic flowering plant. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Struthanthus subrotundus include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Struthanthus subrotundus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
